title: Table Setting Mission
description: A Montessori-inspired table-setting game where kids place food, drinks, and cutlery in the right zones.
learningGoals: Practice table-setting order and place-zone vocabulary
Sort table items by their everyday function
Build practical-life independence through a short digital rehearsal
interactionModel: sort-into-bins drag or tap-tap table items into place zones
feedbackModel: Correct sorts get pop and sparkle SFX plus spoken praise; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Set the Table
modes.skill: table-setting order and spatial placement vocabulary

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
